title: Weather+
description: Contains terrain mods, PMWeather, Farmer's Delight, Create, etc...
body:
### ABOUT THIS MODPACK:
Weather+ is a modpack containing [PMWeather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), and more terrain mods!

### DISCLAIMERS:
1. A minimum of 4GB is required to launch or play. 6GB+ recommended.
2. A beefy GPU may be recommended, PMWeather is very graphically intense.
3. For multiplayer, a strong and stable internet connection is highly recommended for stability.
